findings.description: Reusable new wiki findings to add. Return an empty array when no new finding is needed.

target_page.description: Existing repo-relative wiki page, such as wiki/general/rgb.md or wiki/categories/amputation_arm.md.

title.description: Short finding title without a numeric prefix.

body.description: Reusable visual guidance. Do not include per-image facts or markdown headings.

sources.description: Task IDs that motivated this finding. The pipeline stores these in wiki/log.md, not inside the finding body.
